skill.name: ckm-slides
skill.description: Create strategic HTML presentations with responsive layouts, Chart.js examples, copywriting formulas, and deck strategy references.
skill.summary: Build strategic HTML slide decks with responsive design, persuasive structure, and data visualization patterns.
skill.author: nextlevelbuilder

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported critical and high-risk patterns, but semantic review found no malicious intent or prompt injection. Most severe hits are false positives from markdown examples, copywriting formula names, JavaScript key handling, and an HTML comment. Residual low risk comes from optional local shell command examples, inline presentation scripts, and third-party resource URLs.

low_findings.title: Optional Local Search Commands in Reference Markdown
low_findings.description: The skill includes fenced bash examples that run a local Python search script. The commands use fixed sample queries and do not show credential access, network transfer, or user-controlled shell interpolation. They remain a low-risk pattern because an agent could try to execute a script outside this skill package.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced lines are explicit bash examples with hardcoded local commands. Context shows documentation intent, not automatic execution or exfiltration.

low_findings.title: Third-Party Resource URLs in HTML Template
low_findings.description: The HTML template references Chart.js from jsDelivr and shows a sample Pexels image URL. These are normal presentation dependencies, but generated decks may contact third-party services when opened.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URLs are visible in the template and are used for public assets. There is no evidence of secret transmission or hidden endpoints.

low_findings.title: Severe Static Findings Dismissed as False Positives
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography, sensitive key, filesystem, and critical heuristic findings do not hold after context review. The flagged content is copywriting terminology, JavaScript keyboard event handling, markdown backticks, and an HTML closing comment.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line review shows benign markdown, CSS class names, and browser key checks. No credential material, filesystem access, cryptographic use, or prompt injection text was found.

content.value_statement: Presentation work often stalls when structure, visuals, and persuasion are handled separately. This skill combines deck strategy, responsive HTML templates, Chart.js patterns, and copywriting formulas.
actual_capabilities: Selects presentation structures for investor, sales, demo, internal, and webinar contexts.
Provides responsive HTML and CSS patterns for slide decks and navigation controls.
Includes Chart.js examples for line, bar, doughnut, and radar chart slides.
Maps slide goals to layouts, visual treatments, animation classes, and emotion arcs.
Applies copywriting formulas such as PAS, AIDA, FAB, and before-after-bridge.
Routes the create subcommand to a focused reference for slide generation tasks.
limitations: It is a guidance skill, not a packaged slide rendering application.
Search command examples reference scripts that are outside this skill package.
Generated decks may load public CDN or image URLs unless adapted for offline use.
It does not verify business claims, source data, or legal compliance.

use_cases.title: Investor Pitch Deck
use_cases.description: Create a concise funding deck with a clear problem, market, traction, and ask.

use_cases.title: Sales Presentation
use_cases.description: Build a persuasive sales deck with pain framing, proof, pricing, and next steps.

use_cases.title: Data-Driven Update
use_cases.description: Turn performance metrics into responsive HTML slides with charts and executive-friendly structure.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Basic Deck
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a structured presentation.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 6-slide HTML presentation about our product launch. Use a clear hook, problem, solution, proof, pricing, and CTA.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Sales Pitch
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for persuasive sales content.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 9-slide sales pitch for qualified prospects. Use PAS for the problem slides and include ROI, proof, objections, and next steps.

prompt_templates.title: Design a Metrics Deck
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request with charts and layout constraints.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 10-slide QBR deck with Chart.js visuals, four KPI cards, a timeline, and responsive 16:9 HTML layout.

prompt_templates.title: Produce a Strategic Investor Deck
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for narrative strategy and presentation design.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 12-slide seed deck using the YC structure. Add emotion arcs, copywriting formulas, data chart placeholders, and polished HTML styling.

output_examples.input: Create a product demo deck for a B2B analytics tool.
output_examples.output: A six-slide HTML deck with a problem hook, solution overview, demo section, feature grid, pricing slide, and CTA.

output_examples.input: Turn quarterly metrics into an executive update.
output_examples.output: A QBR-style deck with KPI cards, a Chart.js revenue trend, a timeline, risks, wins, and next-quarter priorities.

output_examples.input: Make a sales pitch for enterprise buyers.
output_examples.output: A nine-slide deck with customer pain, cost of inaction, proof, differentiation, ROI framing, objections, and next steps.

best_practices: Provide audience, goal, slide count, and source data before asking for a deck.
Replace placeholder metrics, claims, and testimonials with verified source material.
Review third-party asset URLs before sharing generated HTML externally.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for a deck without naming the audience or desired action.
Do not present placeholder statistics as verified business evidence.
Do not publish generated HTML with unreviewed external scripts or images.

faq.question: What does this skill create?
faq.answer: It creates structured HTML slide deck guidance with responsive layouts, persuasive copy, and chart patterns.

faq.question: Does it generate PowerPoint files?
faq.answer: No. The references focus on HTML presentations, CSS layouts, and Chart.js examples.

faq.question: Can it make investor pitch decks?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes seed, Series A, and other investor deck structures.

faq.question: Does it include data visualization support?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes Chart.js integration examples and metric dashboard layout patterns.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes, with low-risk notes. Review optional command examples and external asset URLs before use.

faq.question: Which tools can use it?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
